title: Candles to Cake Types
description: Create different types of cakes using candles!
body:
![The title of the project](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f9b0f7e64dd0f0902dec2268ace6de2c0d3adea.png)

This resource pack allows cakes to change texture and model by placing different candles on it. Currently, the avaliable cakes are:
- **Cake with no Cherries** (no candle)
- **Cake with Cherries** (white candle)
- **Small Cake** (light gray candle)
- **Double Cake** (gray candle)
- **Chocolate Cake** (brown candle)
- **Mint Chocolate Cake** (lime candle)
- **Carrot Cake** (orange candle)
- **Golden Carrot Cake** (yellow candle)
- **Blue Birthday Cake** (light blue candle)
- **Pink Birthday Cake** (pink candle)
- **Red Velvet Cake** (red candle)
- **Cookies and Cream Cake** (black candle)

![All cakes that are in this resource pack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/923a109eb83dd7860a4e3359d3af3ebafd1057a6.png)

_Notes:_
- _All candles that are not on this list will appear on the cake as normal._
- _This resource pack works in versions 1.17 and above, even if Minecraft says otherwise._

Leave comments about this project on it's [Planet Minecraft Page.](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/candles-to-cake-types/)
